curation_notes: Patch commit found via squash-merged PR #67 on paritytech/libsecp256k1. The patch renamed Signature::parse to parse_overflowing and added a new parse_standard function that validates R and S values against the curve order, returning an error on overflow. Only src/lib.rs was changed (plus test file tests/verify.rs). Locations derived directly from the patch diff: the vulnerable functions are Signature::parse (line 461) and Signature::parse_slice (line 472) in the pre-patch commit.
